name: io.github.codespar/mcp-unico
description: MCP server for Unico — Brazilian identity verification & KYC (IDCloud, IDPay, IDCheck, Sign). CPF/CNPJ, document OCR, face match, liveness, PEP/watchlists, processes, webhooks, Unico Score.

environmentVariables.name: UNICO_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional override for the IDCloud/IDPay/IDCheck API base URL. Defaults to https://api.unico.co.

environmentVariables.name: UNICO_AUTH_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional override for the OAuth token endpoint base URL. Defaults to https://auth.unico.co.
